## What

<!-- What needs to change? Be specific about files, modules, or patterns. -->

## Why

<!-- What problem does this cause today? Performance, maintainability, developer experience, security? -->

## Proposed Approach

<!-- How would you tackle this? Include scope and any risks. -->

## Impact

- **Risk level**: <!-- low / medium / high -->
- **Effort estimate**: <!-- small (< 1 day) / medium (1-3 days) / large (3+ days) -->
- **Blocking anything?**: <!-- Is this blocking other work? Link tickets if so. -->
